file: 887_Deepika 等 - 2023 - Upgradation of Eugenol to ASTM D 1655 standard Bio-Jet(A) fuel range hydrocarbons via hydrodeoxygena.txt

experiments.description: 在常压固定床反应器中，使用不同负载量的Ru-Ni双金属催化剂（2%Ru-8%Ni/KIT-6-HZSM-5、4%Ru-6%Ni/KIT-6-HZSM-5和6%Ru-4%Ni/KIT-6-HZSM-5）对丁子香酚进行气相加氢脱氧反应，反应温度范围为350-450°C，氢气流量为50 sccm，丁子香酚进料速率为1 mL/h。
experiments.text_snippet: The vapour phase hydrodeoxygenation of Eugenol (Eugenol) was carried out by an atmospheric pressure downflow fixed bed reactor. The different wt.% of mono and bimetals (2Ru-8 %Ni, 4 % Ru-6 %Ni & 6 % Ru-4 %Ni) impregnated on KIT-6/HZSM-5 catalytic support was synthesized... The HDO of Eugenol reaction was tested in the temperature range of 350 to 450 °C, the flow rate of eugenol was 1 mL h⁻¹ and 50 sccm of H₂ (WHSV =10.6 h⁻¹).

Catalyst type.value: Ru-Ni bimetallic catalyst supported on hierarchical zeolite composite
Catalyst type.original: Ru-Ni bimetallic catalyst supported on hierarchical zeolite composite

Operation mode.value: Vapor phase downflow fixed bed reactor
Operation mode.original: Vapor phase downflow fixed bed reactor

Product Selectivity.original: {'2%Ru-8%Ni/KIT-6-HZSM-5': {'350°C': '48.70% n-Propyl benzene', '400°C': '25.5% n-Propyl benzene, 71.17% Phenol 4-propyl', '450°C': 'Lower selectivity towards complete deoxygenated products'}, '4%Ru-6%Ni/KIT-6-HZSM-5': {'350°C': '36.45% n-Propyl benzene, 58.78% Phenol 4-propyl', '400°C': '8.44% n-Propyl benzene, 28.84% Phenol 4-propyl'}, '6%Ru-4%Ni/KIT-6-HZSM-5': {'350°C': '22% n-Propyl benzene, 56% Phenol 4-propyl', '400°C': '3% n-Propyl benzene, 76% Phenol 4-propyl'}}

Catalyst stability.original: Steady reproducibility and recyclability even after 4 cycles
